R0236.title: Payment Tokenization Misconfiguration
R0236.definition: Payment tokens, card substitutes, or binding relationships are misconfigured, causing unauthorized charges or data exposure.
R0236.description: Payment tokens, card substitutes, or binding relationships are misconfigured, causing unauthorized charges or data exposure.
R0236.influence: May cause business abuse, data exposure, financial loss, compliance impact, or supply-chain propagation.
